summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Veracity Technologies landing page. All major functionality working perfectly including navigation, form submission, mobile responsiveness, and content sections.

design_issues.issue: Scroll indicator has animation that makes it unstable for automated clicking, but functionality works

passed_tests: Navigation bar renders with logo, phone number, and CTA button
All navigation links scroll to respective sections (Why Us, Approach, Compliance, FAQ)
Hero section displays correct headline and CTA functionality
Intro stats section shows 41% and 75% data points correctly
Why Specialized IT section shows 4 reasons with icons
Our Approach section shows 4 approach cards
Compliance section shows all 5 compliance items (CMMC, ISO 27001, OSHA, Payment Fraud, BMS/IACS)
Case Study section shows testimonial quote and 3 metrics
Free Audit form has all 4 fields (company, role, phone, email) and submit button
Form submission shows success message with checkmark
Risk Reversal section shows $100 charity guarantee
FAQ section has 6 accordion items that expand/collapse correctly
Footer shows correct contact info, credentials, and affiliations (AGC, ABC)
Mobile menu toggle works perfectly on small viewport
All phone and email links have correct href attributes
success_percentage: frontend: 99% (1 minor animation issue with scroll indicator)
